title: 目標達成の後に・入り混じる黒白

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yep, things are going great! Super smooth, in
fact! My running is slowly improving too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If I can keep this up, I know I'll grow into someone
who can stop countless tears from being shed with
feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yawn... But for now, I guess it's time for bed. I'll give it my all tomorrow too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(Huh... this is... a dream? Some kind of vision? It's
the color black again?)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
(No, this is different. There's also white. Are the
two opposites, black and white, in conflict?)

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Such a strange dream. I wonder what it was
about? Two magatama beads of contrasting
colors entwined together...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It was definitely the yin and yang symbol, but
what was it trying to tell me?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Black and white. Will I have to choose one or the
other?

text_block_list.name: Rickey and Dia
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later that day, Copano Rickey is doing some
partner running with Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... You're so fast Rickey, even though we're running on turf, which is supposed to be my specialty.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Haha, well you know... I debuted earlier, so I do have a little more experience. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It may not come to me as clearly as the voice of
dirt does, but I've started to hear the voice of turf
too. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Something comes to mind as I'm watching her. It's
about time we decide her next race goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Especially if she's able to hear the turf's voice,
even just a little—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I arrive at the spectator stands which overlook
the entire training field...
choice_data_list: Kitasan Black, have you got a minute?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: S-sure. How can I help you?
choice_data_list:
You saw Rickey running on the turf track, right?
What did you think?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, her turf running? Well, judging from how
she looked just now...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'd say she's pretty good on the turf! I mean, she
gave Dia a real run for her money just now.
choice_data_list: I see. Thank you.
I see. Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey will soon enter her classic year.
Which means...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It won't be long before the famed Classic Triple
Crown is upon us. If we're going to change her
course of progression, this might be our last
chance.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaat?! The Classic Triple Crown?! You want
me to take on the biggest of the turf races?!
choice_data_list:
Yeah, it might be good to give it a little
thought.

Yeah, it might be good to give it a little
thought.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey's goal is to spread the word of
feng shui and help people.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And realistically, big races reach more people. I
tell her just that.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I see. You're right. If I'm able to show off the
power of feng shui at a big venue like that...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Then my goal of getting everyone to believe in it
will be realized that much faster! And if things go
well, I may be able to reach an even bigger
audience!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If I'm now hearing the turf's voice, then perhaps
that path is opening up to me. The unknown is
slowly revealing itself.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Turf and dirt. Light and shadow. Two contrasting
tracks. In other words...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Ah! So that's what the black and white meant!
choice_data_list: Come again?
Come again?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I just realized... this might be an opportunity that
I was supposed to happen upon!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I think we need to rethink the path we decided on
before my debut.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, will this be our last chance to make a
decision?
choice_data_list:
Probably. The Satsuki Sho is just around the
corner.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Right. In that case, I'll really have to think hard.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Dirt or turf—which path will lead to the greatest
luck, I wonder!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hmmmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey sits staring at her book for ages,
but she can't seem to make a decision.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, okay... I think I'm starting to see the
answer.
choice_data_list:
Which path does feng shui say is the best
option?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well, honestly... the odds are pretty even right
now.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Black and white are both evenly matched, each
with their own strengths and weaknesses.
choice_data_list: That makes it difficult to decide, huh?
That makes it difficult to decide, huh?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It seems that way at first glance, right? But
depending on how you look at it, there might be
a way.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: We don't have to see things in only black or white. Our top priority isn't to enter every Classic Triple Crown race, is it?
choice_data_list: You have a point.
You have a point.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Different racers have different ways of working
with their trainers and different combinations of
dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, Copano Rickey and I never teamed up
with the purpose of aiming for the Classic Triple
Crown.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If I rush to switch over to turf but fail to employ
my powers of feng shui, it'd all be for nothing. I
wouldn't be able to help anyone.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So, here's my suggestion. How about we send the
dragon underground for this one?
choice_data_list: Send the dragon underground?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Let's hold off on the Satsuki Sho. And in its
place...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Let's enter a major dirt race around the same
time, to give us an idea of my aptitude and
ability.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
A thorough, underground recon mission! Lucky
for us, I know just the race to choose!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey spreads out the race schedule on
the table.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The Fukuryu Stakes is a dirt open race held
around the same time as the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
"Ryu" means "dragon", so even the name of the
race fits our goal! I think its perfect, but what
about you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I give her suggestion some thought. It's true that
we don't have to go after the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll let that one pass and instead enter a race
that'll help us make a better judgment. I believe
that's our best option.
choice_data_list: All right, let's enter the Fukuryu Stakes.
All right, let's enter the Fukuryu Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That decides it then! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whew. You took me by surprise when you
suddenly brought up the Classic Triple Crown.
choice_data_list: Sorry, did I worry you?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No, I'm sure there's some meaning behind your
suggestion, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't some random idea, but one with the
potential to change the future. Yes, a stepping
stone toward a new flow. That's why...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
From here on out, please tell me what you think
and how you feel. Your words will undoubtedly
save lives in the future!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Don't forget, Trainer, you are also a part of my environment, and you help determine my trajectory!
choice_data_list: Yeah!
Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I also want to believe that my suggestion had
some deep meaning. And so, Copano Rickey sets
her eyes on the Fukuryu Stakes.
